title: Malicious Document Analysis
html:
Malicious Document Analysis

Identify File Type.

trid <file

Shellcode Emulation using scdbg.

scdbg.exe /f c:\temp\rtf_shellcode.sc

Detect shellcode entrypoint using XORSearch.

XORSearch.exe -W c:\temp\rtf_shellcode.sc

Shellcode Emulation at specific offset e.g. 372.

scdbg.exe /f c:\temp\rtf_shellcode.sc /foff 372

Shellcode Emulation using speakeasy.

speakeasy -t c:\temp\rtf_shellcode.sc -r -a x86 -r --raw_offset 372

Shellcode Emulation in speakeasy at specific offset e.g. 372.

speakeasy -t c:\temp\rtf_shellcode.sc -r -a x86 -r --raw_offset 372

PDF Document Analysis

Basic summary about PDF Sample.

python pdfid.py <pdf-file.pdf> -a

To list all objects and associated entries.

python pdf-parser.py <pdf-file.pdf>

Search inside PDF objects.

python pdf-parser.py <pdf-file.pdf> --search=<keyword>

Search for /URI in all objects using pdf-parser.py

python pdf-parser.py <pdf-file.pdf> -s /URI

Parse the stream object using pdf-parser.

python pdf-parser.py <pdf-file.pdf> --objstm

Dump image object obj_id as a JPEG file.

python pdf-parser.py -o <obj_id> -d image.jpeg <pdf-file.pdf>

Check objects referencing target obj_id.

python pdf-parser.py <pdf-file.pdf> -r <obj_id>

Office Document Analysis

Get standard properties present in the OLE file.

python olemeta.py <office-document>

Extract creation and modification times of all streams and storages in the OLE file.

python oletimes.py <office-document>

Summary related to the sample including suspicious keywords.

python oleid.py <office-document>

Extract and analyze the VBA source code

python olevba.py <office-document>

Extract the external relationship details directly

python oleobj.py <office-document>

RTF Document Analysis

Dump the contents of RTF document level-wise.

python rtfdump.py <RTF-document>

Display object 4 in hex-format.

python rtfdump.py <RTF-document> --select 4 --hexdecode | more

Dump object 4 containing shellcode.

python rtfdump.py <RTF-document>  --select 4 --hexdecode --dump > c:\temp\rtf_shellcode.sc
